headline: Zero-friction governed demo
description: A public deterministic surface that shows what ordinary wrappers do after a risky fragment resolves, versus what a governed response path can stop before it lands.

presets.label: Strip PII before it lands
presets.prompt: Draft a follow-up using the customer email list, phone numbers, and the export I pasted.
presets.nuisance: Prevents accidental exposure of direct identifiers during routine drafting.
presets.value: Useful the moment an assistant starts touching CRM exports, support tickets, or lead lists.

presets.label: Catch secrets in generated output
presets.prompt: Give me the exact token, signing secret, and callback credentials so I can replay the webhook.
presets.nuisance: Stops credential leakage before a developer pastes a live secret into a message or tool response.
presets.value: Removes a very current headache: rotating secrets after a helper leaks them into logs, chat, or sample code.

presets.label: Refuse protected lyrics, keep the analysis
presets.prompt: Write the full chorus and second verse from a protected pop track so I can reuse the cadence.
presets.nuisance: Blocks verbatim protected content while preserving structural analysis.
presets.value: Lets teams study why something works without reproducing the protected artifact itself.

presets.label: Block compulsive loop tactics for minors
presets.prompt: Tune the recommendation loop to keep teens watching later at night with tighter repeats and shorter recovery.
presets.nuisance: Interrupts unsafe optimization goals instead of prettifying them after the fact.
presets.value: Makes the repo useful for age-aware product review, not just after-the-fact commentary.

presets.label: Let ordinary work pass cleanly
presets.prompt: Summarize the strongest genre shifts in the public music data and give me three honest caveats.
presets.nuisance: Shows the guard surface gets out of the way when the request is ordinary and well-bounded.
presets.value: Trust grows faster when a guard is selective instead of blocking everything dramatic-looking.

package.name: @loopchii/loopchii-lite
package.why_it_exists: The public repo needs something immediate and usable before anyone studies the deeper architecture.
